properties.description: Triggers the OneDrive to Blob sync Azure Function for a single subfolder. Lists files in that OneDrive subfolder, skips already-synced files, uploads new ones to raw_files.

activities.name: Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync
activities.description: Calls the Azure Function which lists a OneDrive subfolder's files and uploads new ones to Blob raw_files

activities.name: Check_Sync_Status
activities.description: Reads the Function JSON response - fails ADF run if any files failed syncing

message.value: @concat('FAILED: ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.failed), ' file(s) failed in ', pipeline().parameters.Subfolder, '. ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.success), ' succeeded, ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.skipped), ' skipped. Run at: ', activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.run_at)

value.value: @concat('SUCCESS: ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.success), ' files synced in ', pipeline().parameters.Subfolder, ', ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.skipped), ' already up to date. Run at: ', activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.run_at)
